name: thoth
description: New Thoth task control-plane monorepo skeleton
author: SeeleAI

scripts.build:client: npm run build:relay && npm run build:protocol && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/client
scripts.build:daemon: npm run build:client && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/daemon
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:daemon && npm run build --workspace=@thoth/cli
scripts.build:app-deps: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:relay && npm run build:protocol && npm run build:client
scripts.dev:daemon: bash -lc 'source scripts/dev-home.sh && configure_dev_thoth_home && exec npm run dev --workspace=@thoth/daemon'
scripts.build:foundation: npm run build:highlight && npm run build:relay && npm run build:protocol && npm run build:client
scripts.typecheck:foundation: npm run typecheck:highlight && npm run typecheck:relay && npm run typecheck:protocol && npm run typecheck:client
scripts.test:foundation: npm run test:highlight && npm run test:relay && npm run test:protocol && npm run test:client
scripts.check:foundation: npm run validate:repo && npm run format:check && npm run lint:foundation && npm run build:foundation && npm run typecheck:foundation && npm run test:foundation
